---
title: "SNA Final Project Slides"
subtitle: "PSTAT 194CS"
author: "Richard Zhang, Toby Liu, Frank Wang, Max Peng"
output: ioslides_presentation
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

# Google Dataset

## Dataset Characteristics:
- Type: Directed web graph
- Nodes (webpages): 875713
- Edges (hyperlinks): 5105039
- Source: Google Programming Contest (2002)



## Slide with R Output

```{r cars, echo = TRUE}
summary(cars)
```

## Slide with Plot

```{r pressure}
plot(pressure)
```
